grant_title: 176 Pennsylvania Grants for Agriculture And Farming
eligible_applicant_type: Nonprofits having a 501(c)(3) status with the IRS, other than institutions of higher education
Nonprofits that do not have a 501(c)(3) status with the IRS, other than institutions of higher education
Public and State controlled institutions of higher education
For profit corporations other than small businesses
project_area: Agriculture, Farming, Rural Development, Sustainable Agriculture, Agricultural Research, Farming Innovation, Agriculture Education Programs, Community-Based Agriculture Projects
demographic_requirements: No specific demographic requirements mentioned; open to a wide range of applicants including nonprofits, businesses, individuals, and government entities.
eligibility_summary: Grants are available for nonprofits, businesses, individuals, government entities, and other organizations working in agriculture, farming, and rural development within Pennsylvania. Eligibility varies by specific grant but generally includes support for agricultural research, sustainable farming, education programs, and community-based agriculture projects.
